content.en:
The cultivation path of the primordial black beast is to use the flesh to engrave a variety of extreme extreme paths, so as to improve the bloodline and transform, and make the combat power stronger and stronger.

And the primordial black beast that Ye Tian attracted was filled with more than thirty kinds of extreme extremes, and it was definitely one of the most demonic among this batch of primordial black beasts.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian fought with his opponent, only showing his strength that was not weaker than the opponent, and did not show too much strength.

Otherwise, Ye Tianzhen could definitely kill this primordial black beast with all his strength.

"Although the number of primordial black beasts is very large, the quality is not good, and it can't defeat the Triple Primordial Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate at all, or it won't be long before this battle can be over!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Now.

Ye Tian was copying the body of a primordial black beast in his body, it was a primordial black beast that had mastered the nine extreme extremes, and his strength was not too weak among the primordial black beasts, but it was not too strong either.

Ye Tian had killed this primordial black beast before, and now it could be copied.

In this battle, it was very chaotic, and no one knew if this primordial black beast had really fallen.

So, this time it won't be exposed.

Soon, the replication was over.

I saw that after Ye Tian shot away this primordial black beast containing more than thirty kinds of extreme extreme paths, he directly entered another place, killing or knocking away one primordial black beast, and a large amount of primordial black light enveloped the audience.

At this time, Ye Tian released his Primordial Black Beast copy body, and was directly knocked away by himself, blending into the camp of the Primordial Black Beast.

This scene is unaware.

Next, Ye Tian controlled his Primordial Black Beast Replica Body to be mixed, and he definitely didn't look for a powerful Triple Ancestor to fight, only a weaker Triple Ancestor to fight with the other party.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

Eventually, the Primordial Black Beast completely collapsed and began to withdraw.

The Primordial Black Beast was withdrawn through another anchor point, it was a completely unfamiliar place, and the Triple Primordial Ancestors naturally did not dare to chase and kill the past, otherwise they would encounter the Primordial Black Beast of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, then no matter how powerful they were, they would not be able to bear it!

Airplanes!!!!

The Quadruple Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate tried to block the Voidless Heavenly Gate, but from another positioning point, the power of the Quadruple Primordial Black Beasts attacked, hindering the blockade of the Quadruple Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate, causing all those Primordial Black Beasts to evacuate.

......

Sunset Mountain.

The void here was littered with corpses, and the Triple Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate quickly cleaned up the battlefield and restored this place to its original state.

As for the treasures on these primordial black beasts, whoever kills them will belong to whomever they want.

However, the Primordial Black Beasts are almost all poor, they have no habit of conserving resources, and when they find them, they devour them immediately, or they prefer to keep them in their lair.

As a result, they carry very few resources with them.

Ye Tian collected all the primordial black beasts he had killed, took away the resources on their bodies, and directly annihilated their physical bodies.

"Ladies and gentlemen, there are no Primordial Black Beasts left in Sunset Mountain, and we need to rearrange the circle here to prevent the Primordial Black Beasts from invading again. In addition, there are many palaces here, so everyone can move in casually. There are so many of our Triple Ancestors, we will definitely not all be stationed here, and the Quadruple Ancestors will soon decide who to garrison here. For the time being, let's all practice here!"

One of the Heavenly Gate Daozi of Wukong - Gengshui Yuan Ancestor said.

Subsequently, one by one, the original ancestors settled in the palace here and began to help set up the magic circle.

......

Primordial Black Sea.

A group of Primordial Black Beasts escaped here, and at this time, a Fourfold Primordial Black Beast of the Primordial Ancestor level came to meet them.

And among them, Ye Tian was mixed in.

Then, Ye Tian followed them in the Primordial Black Sea, and after a long time, he came to a low-level Origin Domain.

It's just that there are no living creatures in this primordial domain anymore, and now it is the transit station of this primordial black beast.

After entering this lower primordial domain, these primordial black seas began to reorient themselves to another area.

The Primordial Black Beasts did this to prevent the Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate from tracking them.

Finally, the Primordial Black Beasts arrived at their destination.

"It's a watershed !!!"

Ye Tian was extremely shocked.

The final destination of these primordial black beasts turned out to be a river basin, which was their lair.

Airplanes!!!!

A portal appeared in the basin, but this portal was fixed, and a large number of primordial black beasts entered the basin through the portal.

Soon, the portal disappeared, and the watershed kept moving.

As long as it was a little later, even if the Fifth Origin Ancestor of the Void Tooth Holy Gate came here, he would not be able to find this river basin.

"The power of this primordial black beast is too small, just now, I felt a terrifying will, and it is definitely the top fourfold ancestor. Ordinary Quadruple Ancestors who want to enter here in disguise will be discovered. Coupled with the fact that their headquarters are a watershed, they will not be detected at all. It's no wonder that the Heavenly Gate can't help this force, so it can't find this place!" Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he copied the body of the original black beast and blended in.

In addition, his causal extreme path had reached the extreme realm, and these people could not spy on his identity through the causal extreme path, so he successfully blended in.

After entering this river basin, Ye Tian realized that this river basin was not simple, and the river basin he had refined before could not be compared to this river basin at all.

The rules of this watershed are almost comparable to those of the Middle Plains, second only to those of the Higher Plains.

Along.

Ye Tian sensed a lot of the aura of the Quadruple Ancestor.

Suddenly, Ye Tian sensed the aura of a cultivator, and the other party shuttled out of a majestic hall in the center of this river basin, and then left this river basin directly.

Although the other party only stayed for a moment, he was still detected by Ye Tian's copying talent.

By copying the information detected by the talent, Ye Tian quickly learned his identity.

"Ancestor of the Ghost Gate!"

Ye Tian didn't know the specific identity of the original ancestor of the Ghost Sect, but it was easy to find.

So, Ye Tian quickly found out the origin of the original ancestor of the Ghost Gate through the information channel of the Wukong Heavenly Gate.

The Ghost Gate Ancestor came from the Fivefold Holy Gate, the Nine Lights Holy Gate, and was a fourfold ancestor of the Nine Lights Holy Gate, and it was also a very powerful Fourfold Ancestor, breaking through to the Fourfold Origin Ancestor realm with thirty-nine extreme poles.

"Could it be that the supporter of this primordial black beast force is the Nine Light Holy Gate?"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, it should not be the support of all the Nine Lights Holy Gate, at most it is just a big man in the Nine Light Holy Gate.
